top_signals.title: A July rate hike from the Fed? The odds are rising
top_signals.summary: Chances of a rate hike in July by the Federal Reserve rose as oil prices jumped on the latest developments in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: License plate cameras may be next target after Supreme Court reins in location tracking
top_signals.summary: If a warrant is ultimately needed for ALPR searches, experts say, it would radically limit how the networks of cameras can be used and would change modern policing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
